who: construction project coordinators managing 5–10 permit applications/month
offer: For construction project coordinators processing 5–10 permit applications/month, inefficient submission processes cause delays in project timelines. We streamline the application process instead of manual tracking and submission of permit applications.
problem: Inefficient government submission processes for permits
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project coordinators
